summary.en-US: Dark black-violet Firefox theme with purple active-tab accents and muted lilac text.

description.en-US: Black Violet Purple is a dark Firefox theme built around a visible purple-black browser frame, muted lilac interface text, and a clean purple active-tab line. It avoids neon glare while still reading clearly as a purple theme.

version.approval_notes: Static Firefox theme. Contains only manifest.json, local icon PNG files, and README.md. No scripts, no permissions, no remote resources, no tracking, no analytics, and no data collection or transmission.
